facebookAccount.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
facebookAccount.notes: intervalGetNewCookie: auto-fetch new cookies from email/password (in minutes). Set null to disable. Requires email+password. Recommended: 1440 (1 day) or 4320 (3 days).

notes_adminPrefix: A second prefix only usable by bot admins (role 2+). Leave empty string or null to disable.
notes_noPrefix: Allow commands without prefix. Set false to disable, true to enable for all users, or 'adminOnly' to allow only bot admins.
notes_antiInbox: Ignore messages from inbox (private/DM). Set true to only respond in group chats.
notes_premiumUsers: List of user IDs with premium access (role 3).
notes_devUsers: List of developer IDs with full access (role 4).

whiteListMode.notes: Only users in whiteListIds can use the bot when enabled.

whiteListModeThread.notes: Only threads in whiteListThreadIds can use the bot when enabled. If both whiteListMode and whiteListModeThread are enabled, either condition being true allows access.

database.notes: type: 'json' | 'sqlite' | 'mongodb'. If mongodb, set uriMongodb. autoSyncWhenStart syncs DB on startup (slower). autoRefreshThreadInfoFirstTime refreshes thread info on first message.

typingIndicator.notes: Show typing indicator before bot replies to commands. Toggle with command: ,typing on/off [-g for global]

dashBoard.notes: Web dashboard for managing the bot. expireVerifyCode is in milliseconds (default 5 minutes).

autoUptime.notes: Keeps bot alive by pinging a URL. timeInterval is in seconds. URL is auto-detected for Replit/Render/Railway.

autoRestart.notes: Auto-restart interval. Use milliseconds (e.g. 86400000 = 1 day) or cron format (e.g. '0 0 * * *'). Set null/false to disable.

autoLoadScripts.notes: Auto-reload scripts when files change. ignoreCmds / ignoreEvents: space or comma-separated filenames to skip.

notes_autoRefreshFbstate: Automatically save updated Facebook cookies (appState) to account.txt.
notes_autoReloginWhenChangeAccount: Auto re-login when account.txt is updated with a new cookie.
notes_autoRestartWhenListenMqttError: Restart bot automatically when MQTT listening fails.

restartListenMqtt.notes: Periodically restart MQTT listener to keep connection stable. timeRestart and delayAfterStopListening are in milliseconds.

notiWhenListenMqttError.notes: Send notification when MQTT goes down (e.g. account locked/banned). Set enable:true to activate.

telegram.notes: Multiple chatIds supported, separated by space or comma.

discordHook.notes: Multiple webhookUrls supported, separated by space or comma.

spamProtection.notes: Auto-ban groups that spam commands. commandThreshold: max commands, timeWindow: seconds window, banDuration: ban length in hours.

hideNotiMessage.notes: Set true to silently ignore instead of sending error messages for each case.

logEvents.notes: Control which event types are logged to the console.

optionsFca.notes: FCA-SIFU login options. simulateTyping:false disables built-in typing simulation (controlled by typingIndicator setting instead). logLevel: 'verbose'|'info'|'warn'|'error'|'silent'.
